title: A Zombie Dinosaur
description: This mod adds a Zombie Dinosaur to Minecraft!
body:
**This mod adds a Zombie Dinosaur to Minecraft!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8NGc3NX88Qo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

this boss is called Zombifaurus.
Health: 400
- Attacks: 
- 1.) Scream: Summon poison gases around poisoning nearby entities.
-  2.) Stomp: deal area damage, and send poison shockwave to the front direction. 
- 3.) Neck Swing: Stuns The Opponent. 
- 4.) Neck Smash.) Create a block seismetic wave which hurts, and pushes the entites on its way.
-  5.) Tail Swing: Area damage
  
**  Notes: this boss is very strong 
  **

this mod required Geckolib and Pehkui mod in order to work correctly. Please Install them, and add them to your modpack for it to work correctly. 

enjoy! thank you for downloading!
